_global.text:
## Summary
Build the "FaithfulC" recipe box as a single-container full-stack app: a NestJS + Prisma REST API (JWT auth, PostgreSQL) that also serves a React + Vite SPA on port 8080, replacing the nginx placeholder.

## Scope

### Files to modify
- `Dockerfile` — replace nginx placeholder with a multi-stage build: build frontend (Vite → static), build backend (Nest), final `node:20-alpine` image that runs `prisma migrate deploy` then `node dist/main.js`, serving API + SPA on `8080`.
- `k8s/deployment.yaml` — add `readinessProbe`/`livenessProbe` on `/api/health`; document required `app-secrets` keys `DATABASE_URL` and `JWT_SECRET`. Keep port 8080 / Recreate strategy.
- `README.md` — document stack, dev/run, demo credentials, env vars.

### Files to create (backend — NestJS/TypeScript)
- `backend/package.json`, `tsconfig.json`, `tsconfig.build.json`, `nest-cli.json`, `.dockerignore`
- `backend/prisma/schema.prisma` — `User` + `Recipe` models (below)
- `backend/prisma/seed.ts` — seed demo user
- `backend/src/main.ts` — global prefix `/api`, `ValidationPipe`, static SPA serving + SPA fallback, CORS, global exception filter
- `backend/src/app.module.ts`
- `backend/src/prisma/prisma.module.ts`, `prisma.service.ts`
- `backend/src/common/all-exceptions.filter.ts` — map Prisma connection errors (`P1001`/`P1017`) → HTTP 503
- `backend/src/health/health.controller.ts` — `GET /api/health` (liveness), `GET /api/health/deep` (DB `SELECT 1`, 503 if down)
- `backend/src/auth/` — `auth.module.ts`, `auth.controller.ts`, `auth.service.ts`, `jwt.strategy.ts`, `jwt-auth.guard.ts`, `dto/login.dto.ts`, `dto/signup.dto.ts`
- `backend/src/recipes/` — `recipes.module.ts`, `recipes.controller.ts`, `recipes.service.ts`, `dto/create-recipe.dto.ts`, `dto/update-recipe.dto.ts`

### Files to create (frontend — React + Vite + TypeScript)
- `frontend/package.json`, `vite.config.ts`, `tsconfig.json`, `index.html`
- `frontend/src/main.tsx`, `App.tsx` (React Router)
- `frontend/src/api/client.ts` — `fetch`/axios wrapper: attach JWT, on 401 → redirect `/login`, surface 503 as friendly banner
- `frontend/src/auth/AuthContext.tsx`, `ProtectedRoute.tsx`
- `frontend/src/components/` — `Header.tsx` ("FaithfulC"), `RecipeCard.tsx`, `FavoriteToggle.tsx`, `SearchBar.tsx`, `EmptyState.tsx`, `RecipeForm.tsx`
- `frontend/src/routes/` — `Login.tsx`, `Signup.tsx`, `RecipeList.tsx`, `RecipeNew.tsx`, `RecipeDetail.tsx`, `RecipeEdit.tsx`, `NotFound.tsx`

### Dependencies
- Backend: `@nestjs/*` (common, core, platform-express, jwt, passport), `passport`, `passport-jwt`, `prisma`/`@prisma/client`, `bcryptjs`, `class-validator`, `class-transformer`, `@nestjs/serve-static`
- Frontend: `react`, `react-dom`, `react-router-dom`, `vite`, `typescript`
- Runtime service: PostgreSQL (already provisioned per `Deployments: postgresql`)

### Integrations
- None (no third-party APIs/SDKs; PostgreSQL is first-party infra).

### Assumptions
- Greenfield: no existing stack to preserve → chose NestJS + Prisma + React/Vite for a single deployable container matching the existing `targetPort: 8080`.
- Auth = `full_auth`: JWT (Bearer) with `bcrypt` password hashing. Public routes: `/login`, `/signup`, `/api/auth/*`, `/api/health`, `/api/health/deep`; all others guarded. First signup user → admin role.
- A demo user is seeded so "Demo login happy path" works: `demo@faithfulc.app` / `demodemo1` (documented in README; overridable via `DEMO_EMAIL`/`DEMO_PASSWORD`).
- Recipes are owned per-user; all list/detail/mutation queries scope to the authenticated `userId`.
- `ingredients` and `steps` stored as free-text (single field each); required = non-empty after trim.
- Search = case-insensitive substring on `title` (`contains`, `mode: insensitive`); favorites filter via query param. Combined via `?q=<term>&favorite=1`.
- `JWT_SECRET` and `DATABASE_URL` supplied via k8s `app-secrets`.

## Implementation Plan

### Step 1: Prisma schema & migrations
**File:** `backend/prisma/schema.prisma`
**Change:** Define `User { id String @id @default(uuid()); email String @unique; passwordHash String; role String @default("user"); createdAt DateTime @default(now()) }` and `Recipe { id String @id @default(uuid()); userId String; title String; ingredients String; steps String; isFavorite Boolean @default(false); createdAt; updatedAt @updatedAt; @@index([userId]); @@index([title]) }`. Generate initial migration.

### Step 2: Prisma service + DB-down → 503 filter
**File:** `backend/src/prisma/prisma.service.ts`, `backend/src/common/all-exceptions.filter.ts`
**Change:** `PrismaService extends PrismaClient` with `onModuleInit` connect. Global filter catches `PrismaClientInitializationError` and known connection codes → respond `503 { message: "The recipe service is temporarily unavailable. Please try again." }`. Other Nest exceptions pass through.

### Step 3: Auth module (JWT)
**File:** `backend/src/auth/*`
**Change:** `POST /api/auth/signup` (email+password ≥8; first user role=admin, else user; 409 on dup email), `POST /api/auth/login` (verify bcrypt; 401 invalid → `{message}`; returns `{ token, user }`), `POST /api/auth/logout` (204, client discards token), `GET /api/auth/me`. `JwtStrategy` validates Bearer; `JwtAuthGuard` applied globally except `@Public()`-decorated auth/health routes → unauthenticated non-public request = 401.

### Step 4: Recipes API
**File:** `backend/src/recipes/*`
**Change:**
- `GET /api/recipes?q=&favorite=` → list owned recipes; apply title `contains` filter and `isFavorite` filter; returns cards data (`id,title,isFavorite`).
- `POST /api/recipes` → `CreateRecipeDto` (`title,ingredients,steps` all `@IsNotEmpty`); 400 on missing → recipe not saved.
- `GET /api/recipes/:id` → owned recipe full detail; 404 if not found/not owned.
- `PATCH /api/recipes/:id` → `UpdateRecipeDto`; required fields validated non-empty on save → 400 if cleared; 404 if missing.
- `PATCH /api/recipes/:id/favorite` → toggle `isFavorite`, returns new state.
- `DELETE /api/recipes/:id` → hard delete; 204; 404 if missing.

### Step 5: Backend bootstrap + static serving
**File:** `backend/src/main.ts`, `app.module.ts`
**Change:** Set global prefix `/api`, enable `ValidationPipe({ whitelist, transform })`, register global exception filter. Use `ServeStaticModule` (or express static) to serve `frontend/dist` with SPA fallback to `index.html` for non-`/api` routes. Listen on `process.env.PORT ?? 8080`.

### Step 6: Frontend auth + routing shell
**File:** `frontend/src/App.tsx`, `auth/AuthContext.tsx`, `ProtectedRoute.tsx`, `components/Header.tsx`
**Change:** Routes: `/login`, `/signup` (public); protected: `/` (list), `/recipes/new`, `/recipes/:id`, `/recipes/:id/edit`; `*` → `NotFound` (404 state). `ProtectedRoute` redirects to `/login` when no token / on 401. `Header` renders "FaithfulC" on every authenticated page. Token persisted in `localStorage`; `data-flow` node marker on each route for machine verification.

### Step 7: Recipe list (search + favorites filter + empty state)
**File:** `frontend/src/routes/RecipeList.tsx`, `components/{RecipeCard,SearchBar,FavoriteToggle,EmptyState}.tsx`
**Change:** Read/write `?q=` and `?favorite=1` as URL query params; fetch `/api/recipes` accordingly; render cards (title + favorite indicator). Card click → `/recipes/:id`. Favorite toggle on card calls `PATCH .../favorite`. When zero results → `EmptyState` message, no cards. Includes an "Add recipe" action → `/recipes/new`.

### Step 8: Add / Detail / Edit / Delete views
**File:** `frontend/src/routes/{RecipeNew,RecipeDetail,RecipeEdit}.tsx`, `components/RecipeForm.tsx`
**Change:** `RecipeNew` posts new recipe → on success navigate `/` (new card appears); client-side + server validation errors shown. `RecipeDetail` shows full title/ingredients/steps + favorite toggle + Edit/Delete; 404 view when API returns 404. `RecipeEdit` updates via PATCH → reflects new content; blocks save on empty required field. Delete confirms then removes and returns to `/`.

### Step 9: Health, Dockerfile, k8s
**File:** `backend/src/health/health.controller.ts`, `Dockerfile`, `k8s/deployment.yaml`
**Change:** Implement health endpoints. Rewrite Dockerfile (multi-stage, migrate-on-start, port 8080). Add probes to `/api/health`; document `DATABASE_URL`/`JWT_SECRET` secrets. Seed runs via `prisma db seed` in the migrate step.

## Testing Strategy
- Backend e2e (Nest + supertest): signup/login/401 flows; recipe CRUD; missing-field → 400; search filter; favorite toggle; unknown id → 404; guarded route without token → 401.
- DB-down: point `DATABASE_URL` at a dead host → assert 503 on `/api/recipes` and `/api/health/deep`.
- Frontend: manual/e2e (Playwright) walk of each route incl. empty-search state, deep-link to missing recipe → 404, demo login → main page.
- Perf: seed ~200 recipes, measure `/api/recipes` + list render; indexes on `userId`/`title` keep p95 < 500ms.

## Risks
- Postgres must be reachable and `DATABASE_URL`/`JWT_SECRET` present in `app-secrets` before the pod becomes ready (migrate-on-start will crash-loop otherwise) — probes surface this.
- Single-container image bundles API + SPA; frontend build must complete before backend serves it (handled by multi-stage ordering).
- Spec only exercises demo login; signup/admin flow is included per full_auth baseline but demo user is the primary path — ensure seed is idempotent.
